category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a terminal-based visual file manager; official Midnight Commander homepage describes GNU Midnight Commander as a visual dual-pane file manager.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is midnight-commander; official homepage uses GNU Midnight Commander / Midnight Commander.
docs_sources: Official homepage documents installation and points to manual pages as the primary documentation; official GitHub README provides embedded project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Midnight Commander source-code page states the repository is hosted on GitHub at https://github.com/MidnightCommander/mc.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists mc, mcedit, mcview, and mcdiff; official homepage describes a full-screen text-mode dual-pane file manager with viewer, editor, and diff viewer.
